report.title: Regulatory Compliance & Technical Alignment Framework (EU AI Act, NIST, ISO 42001)
report.abstract: This module provides the technical alignment framework for mapping international regulations to the enterprise AI stack. It specifies the automation of EU AI Act Article 11/14 requirements, the operationalization of NIST AI RMF 'Map, Measure, Manage' functions, and the implementation of Governance-as-Code (GaC) software standards within CI/CD pipelines.
report.content:
# 1. Global Regulatory Mapping Matrix
| Regulation | Scope | Technical Enforcement Mechanism | | :--- | :--- | :--- | | **EU AI Act (2026)**| High-Risk & GPAI | Automated Annex IV Technical Dossier generation via Sentinel v2.4. | | **NIST AI RMF 1.0** | Enterprise Risk | Real-time risk scoring (OPA-Rego) and alignment scoreboards. | | **ISO/IEC 42001** | AI Management System | CCE (Continuous Compliance Engine) asynchronous audit hooks. | | **GDPR** | Data Privacy | Zero-trust PII scrubbing middleware and 7-year WORM retention. | | **Basel III/IV** | Financial Stability | Capital Drift Index (CDI) mapping AGI reasoning to RWA. |
---
# 2. EU AI Act 2026: Conformity Automation
Under 2026 enforcement, manual compliance is a systemic liability. Sentinel v2.4 automates the conformity lifecycle:
## 2.1 Article 11: Technical Documentation Sentinel's **AuditorWORMVerifier** aggregates evidence from: - **Foundation Layer**: Signed hardware attestation (Nitro Enclave). - **Memory Layer**: Merkle-DAG hashes of RAG context datasets. - **Brain Layer**: Model weights versioning and few-shot instruction logs.
## 2.2 Article 14: Human Oversight Mandatory "Agentic Human-in-the-Loop" (A-HITL) density checks. If the ratio of autonomous vs. human-verified decisions falls below the institutional safety threshold, the **Experience Layer** enforces a mandatory UI gate.
---
# 3. Governance-as-Code (GaC) Standards
Compliance must be integrated into the engineering lifecycle.
## 3.1 CI/CD Governance Gates GitHub Actions workflows must include a `sentinel-verify` step: ```yaml jobs: compliance-scan: steps: - name: Run OPA Rego Audit run: opa eval -d policies/eu_ai_act.rego "data.sentinel.deny" - name: Check Hardware Attestation run: verify-enclave --hash ${{ github.event.model_hash }} ```
## 3.2 OPA/Rego Policy-as-Code Policies are version-controlled in Git and synchronized to the **Immune System** sidecars. - **Example Policy**: "Deny deployment if model training FLOPs > $10^{26}$ AND Board SEV-0 approval is missing."
---
# 4. Systemic Risk & Minimum Viable Governance (MVG) G-SIFIs must maintain an MVG stack to ensure operational continuity during alignment emergencies. - **MVG Components**: 1. Hard-wired Kill-Switch, 2. Air-gapped WORM Auditor, 3. Deterministic Policy Sidecar.
